/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/clipdeck.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/clipdeck.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o clipdeck  libclipdeck_core.a /usr/lib64/libgstapp-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstpbutils-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstvideo-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstaudio-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstbase-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgstreamer-1.0.so /usr/lib64/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib64/libglib-2.0.so
